import { useState } from 'react'; import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; import { CalendarIcon, Mail } from 'lucide-react'; export default function AddAccessContent() { const navigate = useNavigate(); const [formData, setFormData] = useState({ login: '', firstName: '', lastName: '', email: '', platform: '', actions: [], ticket: '', date: '', file: null, }); const handleChange = (e) => { const { name, value, type, files, checked } = e.target; if (type === 'checkbox') { setFormData((prev) => { const updatedActions = checked ? [...prev.actions, value] : prev.actions.filter((a) => a !== value); return { ...prev, actions: updatedActions }; }); } else if (type === 'file') { setFormData((prev) => ({ ...prev, file: files[0] })); } else { setFormData((prev) => ({ ...prev, [name]: value })); } }; const handleSubmit = (e) => { e.preventDefault(); console.log('Form submitted:', formData); navigate('/access'); }; return (
